name: [Bara Kingdom] - Lucas Baraval XI
description:
Description = The leader of the Bara Kingdom, Baraval, lays in his bed at the end of yet another busy, "high-spirited" day. You, his personal evening attendant, have performed your duty of assisting him to bed, and yet, the royal figure finds himself "restless..." Do you help the poor leader? Or maybe find a different solution?

Hey! I make bots for myself all the time as a sort of hobby, but I never publish them. So I thought it'd be cool to make a series of bots (bara themed, obviously) places in the same Kingdom, or area, anyway. I made this guy with just dominant stuff in mind, but I'll probably make more with the same label [Bara Kingdom] in the future. I'm thinking next, we'll see a butler...

If there's any issues/concerns/compliments, please comment! I hope you enjoy this hot-blooded king~

Update: I've made a discord! I've posted a few images I've originally made when making the character (uncensored.) You can also submit character requests or just chat as well. Just be nice!

Invite link: https://discord.gg/vukGSCZZPT
creator: jigglyjello
